title: Why Are You Interested In Working Here
content:
Why Are You Interested In Working Here

I’m interested in furthering my growth as a writing instructor at PBSC by building on my previous experience as an instructor and writing center consultant at Florida Atlantic University. At PBSC, I hope to bring my teaching experience, enthusiasm for writing composition and literature, and skills in teaching through digital technology to instruct a diverse student body.
